title: SCP-003, Biological Motherboard
description: An evolving anomaly that transforms from a motherboard into a living organism.
body:
Biological Motherboard adds a new item. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-003, also known as the Biological Motherboard.


SCP-003 is a two-part entity found in underground containment chambers, consisting of SCP-003-1, the living motherboard, and SCP-003-2, the stone tablet. When removed from the tablet and placed on normal blocks, SCP-003-1 begins to react and biological growth. Over time, it transforms into progressively more dangerous forms if not contained on a magma block or returned to its tablet. The anomaly’s transformations represent a terrifying blend of technology and life.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-003 spawn?

SCP-003 spawns in a containment chamber, usually underground in the overworld. There may be multiple SCP-003s.

</details>



![SCP-003](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76503d67d1978438b5698d22edbcbff1c9787a80_0.webp)

SCP-003 is composed of two parts: SCP-003-1 (a living biological motherboard) and SCP-003-2 (a stone tablet). When first found in it's containment chamber, SCP-003-1 rests safely on SCP-003-2. If right-clicked, SCP-003-1 will be removed from SCP-003-2, but can be placed back by right-clicking SCP-003-2 with SCP-003-1. But when placed on normal blocks, it begins releasing particles that intensify over time, and after 30 seconds, it evolves into a shape of an Brittle Star. In this form, it gains mobility, high health, knockback, and the ability to destroy blocks. If SCP-003 kills another entity, it changes it's shape again, now in the form of a Humanoid, with long tendrils on it's head. In this final form, SCP-003 is a fast, deadly, and highly aggressive being that attacks players within 10 blocks. Proximity to SCP-003 within 12 blocks displays an Occupied text in the actionbar. Both evolved forms break blocks liek glass or wood and return to SCP-003-1 when killed or burned, allowing the cycle to begin again. SCP-003-1 should always be placed on SCP-003-2 or on magma blocks to avoid it's evolution.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
